title: Open Recommendations — v1.1.0 Wrapper
description: Versioned wrapper adding decline_count integer field per recommendation entry. Closes at wrapper scope AND per-property: metadata is wrapped with allOf + unevaluatedProperties: false (rejects metadata.extra), recommendations items wrapped the same. decline_count is monotonic-cumulative: increments on each DECLINE write recorded by /create, /audit, /secure, or /optimize; never decremented even if rec re-transitions PENDING -> DECLINED. Mirrors profile.schema.v1.1.0.json's per-property closure pattern.

decline_count.description: Cumulative count of DECLINED events for this recommendation. Increments on each decline write recorded by /create, /audit, /secure, or /optimize. Read-only from SessionStart hook. Independent of status. Monotonic — never decremented.
